Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: A comment left by a user on the portfolio.

user.description: The display name of the user.

photo.description: The photo URL of the user.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

replyToId.description: ID of the parent comment if this is a reply.

likesCount.description: Number of likes the comment has received.

createdAt.description: The time the comment was created.

Like.title: Like
Like.description: A record of a user liking a specific comment.

uid.description: The UID of the user who liked the comment.

/comments/{commentId}/likes/{userId}.description: Subcollection to track individual likes and prevent duplicates.
